title: dysoxylum amooroides var. otophorum
intro: Dysoxylum amooroides var. otophorum is a species of plant that belongs to the family Meliaceae, commonly known as the mahogany family, and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Dysoxylum amooroides var. otophorum lie in its bark, which contains flavonoids and tannins, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant, making it useful in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory problems. Dysoxylum amooroides var. otophorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to create extracts and powders for its medicinal properties.
